title: 小赵怨写周报稿，龙虾错送全员群

voice.role_voice_policy: Same storyteller voice for narration and all characters; shift role through wording, pace, pressure, and pauses instead of separate timbres.
voice.notes: 原创的温暖北方说书人，不模仿真实人物。

segments.text: 闲言少叙，书归正传。列位，今儿咱讲一回《小赵怨写周报稿，龙虾错送全员群》。这故事说的是周一早上的一桩办公室奇案：产品经理小赵写了个吐槽草稿，旁边的小龙虾 Agent 太勤快，一个标题，差点把他送进全员群现场答辩。
小赵这个人，心不坏，就是困。咖啡还没咽下去，手底下先写了一段草稿，专门吐槽昨儿个会开得像绕城高速。
不料旁边这位小龙虾 Agent 是个实在人。它一寻思：标题里有周报，那不就是让我发吗？它不看怨气，只看标题；标题里既有周报二字，那在它眼里就等同于圣旨到。
只见屏幕上唰唰唰三下排版，叮的一声，全员群里多了一份正式周报。小赵那杯咖啡举在半空，热气都吓得拐了个弯。
群里沉默七秒。七秒之后，老板回了一个问号。列位，一个问号不可怕，可怕的是它后头，没跟表情包。

audio_bed.music_style: optional light percussion or plucked bed; keep below narration

prop_sfx_policy.notes: 醒木只做少量定场和回扣，不写进朗读文本。

audio_bed.loudness_note: Speech stays primary. Insert silence or effects after TTS render if provider lacks pause control.

rendering_notes: Keep one stable storyteller timbre across all segments; do not assign separate character voices.
Render short scripts in a single pass when the provider drifts across split segments.
Render split segments only with the same provider voice id or the same local reference/prompt voice.
For final pingshu timing, expand important segments into events: say for spoken text and pause for real inserted silence.
Insert waking block SFX only as post-processed audio blocks from assets/sfx; do not ask TTS to say SFX labels.
Prefer clean voice settings; do not stack heavy dialect, emotion, rate, and negative quality prompts.
